scope: AA component ablation replay (Brief C, zero new LLM calls where possible).

aa_top1.label: top-k = 1
aa_top1.note: Requires live ablation run; no matrix row available.

aa_no_adaptive_topk.label: adaptive top-k off
aa_no_adaptive_topk.note: Requires live ablation run; no matrix row available.

aa_no_memory.label: memory off
aa_no_memory.proxy_note: No-memory ReAct proxy; Phase2 toy shows +8.3pp success without memory.

aa_no_verifier.label: verifier off
aa_no_verifier.note: Requires live ablation run; no matrix row available.

aa_no_budget_gate.label: no strong budget gate
aa_no_budget_gate.proxy_note: MoA proxy for higher fan-out when budget gate relaxed.

aa_no_cost_penalty.label: no cost-quality frontier
aa_no_cost_penalty.note: Requires live ablation run; no matrix row available.

ablation_matrix.label: P2 tuned control
ablation_matrix.note: Adaptive top-k, strong budget gate, memory on, verifier on.

ablation_matrix.label: memory off
ablation_matrix.proxy_note: No-memory ReAct proxy; Phase2 toy shows +8.3pp success without memory.

ablation_matrix.label: no strong budget gate
ablation_matrix.proxy_note: MoA proxy for higher fan-out when budget gate relaxed.

ablation_matrix.label: direct-first (ReAct then AA)
ablation_matrix.note: Deployment policy: AA only after cheap ReAct failure.

component_recommendations.rationale: Reference configuration for delta comparisons; replace with direct-first deployment policy.
No matrix replay; schedule live ablation before remove/keep decision.
No matrix replay; schedule live ablation before remove/keep decision.
Proxy ReAct (no memory) beats always-AA on cost-norm; Phase2 toy shows aa_no_memory +8.3pp success. Gate memory to escalation-only or outcome-memory pilot.
No matrix replay; schedule live ablation before remove/keep decision.
MoA proxy (relaxed fan-out) has higher accuracy but worse cost-norm than control; budget gate limits over-activation on easy tasks.
No matrix replay; schedule live ablation before remove/keep decision.
Direct-first improves cost-norm by +0.2348 vs always-AA with accuracy delta +0.1153 (matrix replay).

rescue_tasks.interpretation: AA rescued via extra modules ['critic_agent'] (2 calls vs ReAct 1). Step-1 empty routes: 1; critic+code on retry drove fix.
AA rescued via extra modules ['critic_agent'] (2 calls vs ReAct 1). Step-1 empty routes: 1; critic+code on retry drove fix.
AA failed after activating ['code_agent', 'critic_agent'] (empty route steps=1); MoA succeeded with parallel proposers.

live_pilot.scope: Live AA component ablation pilot (Brief C).
